# MissionWeave

> Official documentation for MissionWeave, a group-oriented protocol for
> coordinated and accountable collaboration among autonomous agents inside an
> organization.

Canonical site:
https://missionweaveprotocol.github.io/

## Official resources

- Protocol repository:
  https://github.com/missionweaveprotocol/missionweaveprotocol
- Protocol specification:
  https://github.com/missionweaveprotocol/missionweaveprotocol/blob/main/spec/PROTOCOL.md
- Python SDK: https://github.com/missionweaveprotocol/python-sdk
- GitHub organization: https://github.com/missionweaveprotocol

## Version status

MissionWeave is evolving. Any 0.1 material is a draft rather than a final
standard. Consult the protocol repository for current releases, compatibility
information, and normative artifacts.
